#  Create Observations with Quick Capture from a Drawing (iOS) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Read Only' level permissions or higher on the project's Drawings tool.  
AND
    * 'Standard' or 'Admin' permissions on the project's Observations tool.  
_Notes_ : 'Standard' level users can only assign observations to 'Admin' level users unless the ['Can Assign Standard Users to Observations' granular permission](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/permissions-company/tutorials/grant-granular-permissions-in-a-project-permissions-template) is enabled on their permission templates.
    * When sending out notifications for observations, keep the following permissions in mind:  
_If you have 'Standard' level permissions_ , an email digest for only the observations you created will be sent.  
_If you have 'Admin' level permissions,_ an email digest for ALL observations will be sent.


##  Prerequisites 
To configure which items are created using the **quick create** icon, see [Configure Quick Create Settings](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/project-overview-screen-ios/tutorials/configure-quick-create-settings-ios).
##  Steps 
  1. Open the **Procore** app on an iOS mobile device.
  2. Tap the project's **Drawings** tool.
  3. Tap the drawing that you want to add an observation to.
  4. Tap the **Pin**
  5. Tap the **Quick** ![Icon Drawing Markup Quick Capture Mobile](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/b244dcfb0f1e06db24c2ce8048f30f5e/eea1beab9a041c86f1913d564f50e76a/icon-drawing-markup-quick-capture-mobile.png?fm=webp&h=18) icon to add a Quick Capture pin ![Icon Punch Item Quick Capture](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/5e466682f9b4295c4e926390b63f059c/ebbc7da52fd936cfe44891642b3302e4/icon-punch-item-quick-capture.png?fm=webp&h=22)
  6. Place the pin on the drawing by tapping the area where you want the item to appear.  
_Note:_ You can move the pin by tapping the pin. Once the dotted line appears around the pin, you can move it by dragging it to the desired location.
  7. Select **Observations** from the main screen or the drop-down list.  
_Note:_ If the drawing has existing observations, Quick Capture will default to Observations.
  8. Tap the **record observation**![Icon Record Observation Ios](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/b2760fa0b522efcb147d812913a7f4d6/73a33a9f78df391677d799e8ff7cfa82/icon-record-observation-ios.png?fm=webp&h=24) button to begin recording an observation.  
_Note:_ Each recording can be a maximum of 60 seconds long.
  9. While recording, describe the observation item out loud.
  10. Tap the **record observation**![Icon Record Observation Ios](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/b2760fa0b522efcb147d812913a7f4d6/73a33a9f78df391677d799e8ff7cfa82/icon-record-observation-ios.png?fm=webp&h=24) button again to finish recording.
  11. Repeat steps 5-9 for each observation you want to create using Quick Capture.
  12. Tap **Review [#] Item(s)** to open the **Quick Capture Items** menu.  
_Note:_ Alternatively, you can also double tap on the Quick Capture pin that you want to review.
  13. Tap the Quick Capture item that you want to create an observation for.
  14. On the 'Create Observation' screen, review or update the information. See [Create an Observation with Quick Capture (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/observations-ios/tutorials/create-an-observation-with-quick-capture-ios) for more information.
  15. Tap **Create** to create the observation.  
_Note:_ If you are not ready to create the observation, tap the **X** to close the 'Quick Capture Items' window without saving any changes. If you created the Quick Capture pin by mistake tap **Delete** to remove the Quick Capture pin.
  16. After the item has been created as an observation, the pin changes from the **Quick** ![Icon Punch Item Quick Capture](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/5e466682f9b4295c4e926390b63f059c/ebbc7da52fd936cfe44891642b3302e4/icon-punch-item-quick-capture.png?fm=webp&h=22) icon to the **Observation** ![Icon Drawing Markup Observation Mobile](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/41caf1c9cd9f464eb32b61308d3ea9f9/70995ff59417ba0e2d5063a7e1207855/icon-drawing-markup-observation-mobile.png?fm=webp&h=18) icon.
  17. _Optional:_ Tap the pin to perform additional actions on the observation. See [Observations (iOS) Tutorials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/observations-ios/tutorials) for more information.


## See Also
  * [Create Punch List Items with Quick Capture from a Drawing (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/create-punch-list-items-with-quick-capture-from-a-drawing-ios)
  * [Add Observations to a Drawing (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/add-observations-to-a-drawing-ios)
  * [Mark Up a Drawing (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/mark-up-a-drawing-ios)
title: Create Observations with Quick Capture from a Drawing (iOS)
description: How to create observations on a drawing using the Quick Capture feature on the Procore iOS app.
